zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Thurston II於1591年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其時，他的父親Adam Thurston30歲，母親Grace17歲。他於1613年與Ellen Wood在英國坎布利其爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1662年4月20日之前在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾奧爾維斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Thurston II于1591年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其时，他的父亲Adam Thurston30岁，母亲Grace17岁。他于1613年与Ellen Wood在英国坎布利其爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1662年4月20日之前在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾奧爾維斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Thurston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Anglo-Norman, Anglo-Scandinavian, and Middle English personal name Thurstan, Thorsten (Old Norse Thórsteinn, Thorsten, Anglicized as Old English Thurstān; see Thorstensen ).
habitational name from Thurston in Suffolk, so called from the genitive case of the Old Norse personal name Thóri (see Thor ) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Tustin
meanings: English (Worcestershire, Warwickshire and Gloucestershire): variant of   Thurston  .

variants.name: Thorstensen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Thorsten, a variant of Thorstein, Old Norse Thórsteinn, composed of the name of the god Thórr (see Thor ) + steinn ‘stone, rock’, hence meaning ‘altar of Thor’ or perhaps ‘hammer of Thor’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Thurston II was born in 1591, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Adam Thurston, was 30 and his mother, Grace, was 17. He married Ellen Wood in 1613, in Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died before 20 April 1662, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, and was buried in Olveston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Thurston II est né en 1591, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam Thurston, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Grace, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Wood en 1613, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé avant 20 avril 1662, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Olveston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Thurston II 1591 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Thurston 30 und seine Mutter Grace 17. Er hat 1613 in Cambridgeshire, England Ellen Wood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb vor 20. April 1662 in Saffron Walden, Essex, England und wurde in Olveston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Thurston II è nato il nel 1591 nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Adam Thurston, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Grace, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Wood nel 1613, nel Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì prima del 20 aprile 1662, nel Saffron Walden, Essex, England, e fu sepolto a Olveston, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Thurston IIが1591年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた時，父Adam Thurstonは30歳，母Graceは17歳であった。1613年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアでEllen Woodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1662年4月20日以前にイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンで死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアオルベストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Thurston II(이)가 1591년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Thurston(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1613년 영국 캄브리지실르에서 Ellen Wood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1662년 4월 20일 이전 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 베스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Thurston II nasceu em 1591, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Adam Thurston, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Grace, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Wood em 1613, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 20 de abril de 1662, em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Olveston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Thurston II родился в 1591 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam Thurston было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Wood в 1613 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер перед 20 апрель 1662 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия и был похоронен в местности олвестон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam Thurston II nació en 1591, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Adam Thurston, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Grace, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Ellen Wood en 1613, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió antes de 20 de abril de 1662, en Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Olveston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
